@@ -183,7 +183,7 @@ docker run -d \

 ### Option B: Deploy With A Single Binary
@@ -192,10 +192,10 @@ Download the correct binary for your OS/architecture from GitHub Releases:
 
 ```bash
 chmod +x ./agentlogs-server
-./agentlogs-server --migrations
+./agentlogs-server
 ```
 
-`--migrations` applies embedded migrations before startup. Use `--only-migrations` for migration-only runs.
+By default, the standalone server applies embedded migrations before startup. Use `--no-migrations` to skip them or `--only-migrations` to run them and exit.
 
 ### Connect Your Agents To Your Host

 <Note>Mount `/app/.data` to persist both SQLite data and uploaded transcript blobs.</Note>
@@ -68,10 +68,11 @@ Download a matching binary from the GitHub Releases page (`server-vX.Y.Z` tags),
 
 ```bash
 chmod +x ./agentlogs-server
-./agentlogs-server --migrations
+./agentlogs-server
 ```
 
-- `--migrations` runs embedded migrations, then starts the server
+- By default, the binary runs embedded migrations, then starts the server
+- `--no-migrations` skips startup migrations
 - `--only-migrations` runs migrations and exits
 
 ## 4. Connect Your CLI And Plugins
@@ -86,7 +87,7 @@ Use your public hostname (without `https://`) so your local CLI/plugins upload t
 
 ## 5. Upgrade
 
-When upgrading, deploy a newer image/binary and run with migrations again:
+When upgrading, deploy a newer image/binary and start it again:
 
-- Docker: restart container with the new tag and `--migrations`
-- Binary: replace binary and run `./agentlogs-server --migrations`
+- Docker: restart the container with the new tag; embedded migrations run on startup by default
+- Binary: replace the binary and run `./agentlogs-server`

@@ -77,10 +77,18 @@ Build from source:
 bun run --filter ./packages/server build
 ```
 
-Run with migrations before startup:
+Run the standalone binary:
 
 ```bash
-./dist/agentlogs-server --migrations
+./dist/agentlogs-server
+```
+
+By default, the binary applies embedded migrations before startup.
+
+Skip startup migrations:
+
+```bash
+./dist/agentlogs-server --no-migrations
 ```
